steps.t: Evidence that the mearas still exist may be nearby in Misthallow. You should search for evidence that the mearas still exist.
The hoofprints may lead to a mearh. You should follow the hoofprints.
Léothred can be found at Thokvist. You should talk to Léothred.
Léothred thought he saw a mearh near to Thokvist in Misthallow. You should go to that location and see if you can find the mearh.
Léothred can be found at Thokvist. You should talk to Léothred.
